title: Biostatistician I
description: Kaiser Permanente is seeking a Biostatistician I to support clinical research and health services research initiatives. You will design studies, analyze healthcare data, and provide statistical expertise to researchers and clinicians studying treatment effectiveness and health outcomes. Your work contributes to evidence-based medicine and care improvement.
responsibilities: Design statistical analysis plans for clinical and observational studies
Analyze healthcare data using SAS, R, or Python
Develop statistical models to evaluate treatment outcomes
Create statistical tables, figures, and reports for publications
Collaborate with physicians and researchers on study protocol design
Present statistical findings to clinical and research teams

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Biostatistics, Mathematics, or related field
skills: Healthcare data and EHR systems understanding
certifications: None required; MS in Biostatistics or related field preferred

benefits: Competitive salary and comprehensive health insurance
Kaiser Permanente wellness programs and preventive care
Flexible remote work and professional development
